parameters.content:
# 🎯 Event Follow-up Orchestrator

Two phases in one workflow:

**Phase 1 — LEFT SIDE (Create & Distribute)**
Webhook triggers when event ends → AI generates a custom survey based on speakers, sessions, format → Form created & published → Form registered for monitoring → Emails sent to all attendees → Slack notification

**Phase 2 — RIGHT SIDE (Monitor & Analyze)**
Formfex Webhook Trigger fires in real-time on each new response → Response count checked → Every response gets a pulse check → At 100 responses: full AI report + next-event recommendations + PDF report

**Connection:** Phase 1 creates the form and registers it for real-time webhook monitoring, Phase 2 reacts instantly to each submission

## Phase 1 — Create & Distribute

Triggered when an event ends.
AI builds a custom feedback form from the event's speakers, session types, and format.
Form is published, registered for real-time webhook monitoring, and emailed to every attendee.

parameters.prompt:
=Create a post-event feedback form. CRITICAL: The form must be built around THIS specific event's speakers, sessions, and format — not generic event questions.

Event context:
- Event: {{ $json.body.eventName }}
- Type: {{ $json.body.eventType }} (conference/workshop/webinar/meetup/hackathon)
- Duration: {{ $json.body.duration }}
- Format: {{ $json.body.format }} (in-person/virtual/hybrid)
- Venue/Platform: {{ $json.body.venue || 'Online' }}
- Speakers & sessions:
{{ $json.body.speakers.map(s => '  - ' + s.name + ' | Topic: "' + s.topic + '" | Type: ' + s.sessionType + ' | Duration: ' + s.duration).join('\n') }}
- Had networking sessions: {{ $json.body.hasNetworking }}
- Had workshops/hands-on: {{ $json.body.hasWorkshops }}
- Catering provided: {{ $json.body.hasCatering }}
- Event track/theme: {{ $json.body.track || 'general' }}

DYNAMIC RULES — the form MUST change based on event data:
1. Overall event rating (1-5 stars) — always include
2. For EACH speaker, generate a TOPIC-SPECIFIC question (not just "rate this speaker"):
   {{ $json.body.speakers.map(s => '   - ' + s.name + ' ("' + s.topic + '"): If sessionType is keynote → "How inspiring was the vision presented?"; If workshop → "Were the hands-on exercises useful? Could you apply them at work?"; If panel → "Were the diverse viewpoints valuable?"; If demo → "Would you try the tool/product demonstrated?"').join('\n') }}
3. For EACH speaker, also ask: "Content depth" (too basic / just right / too advanced) — this adapts to the topic
4. EVENT TYPE specific questions:
   - Conference: ask about track variety, session scheduling, room transitions
   - Workshop: ask about hands-on time ratio, materials provided, skill level match
   - Webinar: ask about audio/video quality, Q&A interactivity, recording availability
   - Meetup: ask about community feel, venue atmosphere, conversation quality
   - Hackathon: ask about challenge difficulty, mentor availability, judging fairness
5. FORMAT specific:
   - In-person: venue comfort, parking/transit, signage, badge pickup speed
   - Virtual: platform stability, chat engagement, breakout room experience
   - Hybrid: "Did remote attendees feel equally included?"
6. If hasNetworking: "Rate networking opportunities", "Did you make meaningful connections?" (1-5)
7. If hasWorkshops: "Were workshop group sizes appropriate?", "Rate instructor guidance"
8. If hasCatering: "Rate food & beverage quality" (only ask if they actually had food!)
9. Future topics: generate a multi-select list based on the event's track/theme with related topics (not random generic topics)
10. End with: "Would you attend next year?" + open text feedback

An event with 2 keynotes gets 2 keynote-style questions. A hackathon with 5 mentor-led workshops gets workshop-specific questions for each. A virtual webinar should NEVER ask about parking.

parameters.subject: =Thank you for attending {{ $('Event Ended Webhook').item.json.body.eventName }}!
parameters.html:
=

Hey {{ $json.attendees.name.split(' ')[0] }},

Thank you for being part of {{ $('Event Ended Webhook').item.json.body.eventName }}!

We're already planning the next one and your feedback will shape it. Could you share your thoughts? It takes 3 minutes:

Share Your Feedback

Your insights help us bring better speakers, topics, and experiences.

See you at the next one!
The {{ $('Event Ended Webhook').item.json.body.organizerName }} Team

parameters.content:
## Phase 2 — Monitor & Analyze

Formfex Webhook Trigger fires in real-time on every new response.

**Track A (every response):** AI pulse check → Slack
**Track B (at 100 responses):** Full AI report → Next event plan → PDF report → Slack

parameters.message:
Analyze all 100 event feedback responses. Provide a comprehensive report:

1. OVERALL: Average event rating and satisfaction distribution
2. SPEAKERS: Rank each speaker by content quality and presentation style. Who was the crowd favorite? Who needs improvement?
3. LOGISTICS: Venue/platform rating, timing feedback, networking satisfaction
4. CONTENT: Most valuable takeaways mentioned (top 5 themes)
5. FUTURE TOPICS: What topics do attendees want next? (ranked by demand)
6. RETENTION: % who would definitely attend next event vs unlikely
7. VERBATIM: 3 best positive quotes and 3 most constructive criticisms

Format as a professional post-event report suitable for stakeholders.

parameters.text:
=:tada: *100 Response Milestone — Full Event Report*

{{ $json.answer }}

---
_Formfex AI Analytics — auto-generated at 100 responses_

parameters.message: Based on speaker ratings and feedback, which speakers should we invite back and which topics should we prioritize for the next event? Give me a concise recommendation list.
Quick pulse check: what's the overall sentiment of the latest batch of responses? One paragraph, include the current response rate trend.

parameters.content:
### Track B — 100 Response Milestone
Full AI report → Speaker recommendations → PDF analytics

### Track A — Every Response
Quick AI sentiment pulse → Slack
